The '''''Ashanti''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was part of the operation to steal [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from a secret Imperial base. Despite the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] sending reinforcements consisting of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] group [[Eagle (corvette group)|''Eagle'']], [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]], the freighter managed to steal TIE Avengers so that the Rebels could study them.

{{Ship-stub}}
